summary: Iteration 16: Testing major site update - mobile landing on ALL service pages, brand logos everywhere, Hotpoint removal. Found and FIXED critical bug: App.js was importing OLD DishwasherRepair.js and OvenRepair.js instead of NEW DishwasherRepairPage.js and OvenRepairPage.js files. After fix, all 12 test features pass.
action_items: Consider removing old DishwasherRepair.js and OvenRepair.js files (they are unused now)
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIXED: App.js was importing DishwasherRepair and OvenRepair from old files without mobile landing. Updated to DishwasherRepairPage and OvenRepairPage.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 12 test features pass after bug fix)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile breakpoint is 768px. MobileServiceLanding template is reused for all service pages. Brand logos stored at /images/brands/*.svg and *.png. 25 total brands (Hotpoint was removed). BrandsDropdownPanel.jsx shows small logo icons next to brand names in navbar.

washer_repair.details: Mobile landing with 'Expert Washer Repair in SF. Today.', trust badges, $60 box, issue chips (Not Spinning, Won't Drain, Leaking), 8 brand logos, sticky bar

dryer_repair.details: Mobile landing with 'Expert Dryer Repair in SF. Today.', trust badges, $60 box, 8 brand logos, sticky bar

dishwasher_repair.details: Mobile landing with 'Expert Dishwasher Repair in SF. Today.', trust badges, sticky bar - REQUIRED FIX to App.js imports

oven_repair.details: Mobile landing with 'Expert Oven Repair in SF. Today.', sticky bar - REQUIRED FIX to App.js imports

cooktop_repair.details: Mobile landing with 'Expert Cooktop Repair in SF. Today.', sticky bar

freezer_repair.details: Mobile landing with 'Expert Freezer Repair in SF. Today.', sticky bar

ice_maker_repair.details: Mobile landing with 'Expert Ice Maker Repair in SF. Today.', sticky bar

wine_cooler_repair.details: Mobile landing with 'Wine Fridge Repair in SF. Today.', sticky bar (uses wine-fridge-repair-page testid)

disposal_repair.details: Mobile landing with 'Expert Disposal Repair in SF. Today.', sticky bar

residential_appliance_repair.details: Mobile landing with 'Expert Appliance Repair in SF. Today.', sticky bar

washer_repair.details: Desktop template with navbar, breadcrumbs, 18 brand LOGOS in 'Brands We Service' section

brands_page.details: 25 brand cards with logos, Hotpoint NOT present, 'All Brands (25)' count correct

navbar_brands_dropdown.details: 18 brand logo icons displayed next to brand names, 'View all brands' link present

refrigerator_repair.details: Desktop template with 18 brand logos in 'Brands We Service' section

service_areas_link.details: Homepage Service Areas link navigates to /service-areas page

bug_fixed.description: App.js was importing old component files (DishwasherRepair.js, OvenRepair.js) that don't have useIsMobile hook or MobileServiceLanding template. Fixed by updating imports to use new files (DishwasherRepairPage.js, OvenRepairPage.js).
